description: Master list of trade categories TradeFlow can match leads against. Used by the email writer to personalise outreach and by the router to filter relevant container types per client.

trade_categories.label: Plumbing
trade_categories.description: General plumbing, pipework, drainage, and sanitary ware.

trade_categories.label: Electrical
trade_categories.description: Electrical installation, testing, EICR, emergency lighting, and small power.

trade_categories.label: Roofing
trade_categories.description: Flat and pitched roofing, guttering, fascias, and soffits.

trade_categories.label: Decorating
trade_categories.description: Interior and exterior painting, wallpapering, and surface preparation.

trade_categories.label: Flooring
trade_categories.description: Supply and fitting of carpet, vinyl, LVT, hardwood, and safety flooring.

trade_categories.label: HVAC
trade_categories.description: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning installation and maintenance.

trade_categories.label: Gas works
trade_categories.description: Gas Safe registered works including boiler installation, servicing, and gas line maintenance.

trade_categories.label: Fire safety
trade_categories.description: Fire door installation and inspection, suppression systems, alarm installation, and fire risk assessment.

trade_categories.label: Carpentry and joinery
trade_categories.description: Bespoke joinery, door hanging, fitted furniture, and general carpentry.

trade_categories.label: Groundworks and paving
trade_categories.description: Car parks, pathways, drainage, and external hard landscaping.

trade_categories.label: Air conditioning
trade_categories.description: Split-system and VRF air conditioning installation, servicing, and F-Gas compliance.

trade_categories.label: Commercial kitchen
trade_categories.description: Commercial kitchen installation, extraction canopy fitting, and equipment maintenance.

trade_categories.label: Fencing and security
trade_categories.description: Perimeter fencing, gates, access control, and CCTV installation.
